ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "compartments" INTEGER /* Number of compartments in the model */,
  "constraints" INTEGER /* Number of constraints in the model */,
  "events" INTEGER /* Number of events in the model */,
  "events_delay" INTEGER /* Number of delayed events in the model */,
  "events_event_assignments" INTEGER /* Number of event assignments in the model */,
  "events_math" INTEGER /* Number of mathematical expressions related to events */,
  "events_priority" INTEGER /* Number of priority assignments for events */,
  "events_trigger" INTEGER /* Number of trigger conditions for events */,
  "function_definitions" INTEGER /* Number of function definitions in the model */,
  "initial_assignments" INTEGER /* Number of initial assignments in the model */,
  "kinetic_laws" INTEGER /* Number of kinetic laws in the model */,
  "kinetic_laws_math" INTEGER /* Number of mathematical expressions related to kinetic laws */,
  "level_version" TEXT /* Version level of the model */,
  "math" INTEGER /* Number of mathematical expressions in the model */,
  "parameters" INTEGER /* Number of parameters in the model */,
  "parameters_local" INTEGER /* Number of local parameters in the model */,
  "reactions" INTEGER /* Number of reactions in the model */,
  "rules" INTEGER /* Number of rules in the model */,
  "rules_algebraic_rules" INTEGER /* Number of algebraic rules in the model */,
  "rules_assignment_rules" INTEGER /* Number of assignment rules in the model */,
  "rules_rate_rules" INTEGER /* Number of rate rules in the model */,
  "species" INTEGER /* Number of species in the model */,
  "unit_definitions" INTEGER /* Number of unit definitions in the model */,
  "release" TEXT /* Release version of the model */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the model was released */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., curated, submitted) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "mathematical_expression" TEXT /* Mathematical expression of the model */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Categorization based on model complexity */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of biological system the model represents */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the model */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last modified */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easier search and categorization */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the model is shared */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation information for the model */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the model data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compartments" (
  "compartment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compartment */,
  "model_id" TEXT /* ID of the model the compartment belongs to */,
  "compartment_name" TEXT /* Name of the compartment */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the compartment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the compartment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the compartment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compartment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compartments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" TEXT /* ID of the model the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "model_id" TEXT /* ID of the model the species belongs to */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "initial_concentration" REAL /* Initial concentration of the species */,
  "compartment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compartment the species is in */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the species */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_compartment_id FOREIGN KEY ("compartment_id") REFERENCES compartments ("compartment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reactions" (
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction */,
  "model_id" TEXT /* ID of the model the reaction belongs to */,
  "reaction_name" TEXT /* Name of the reaction */,
  "reactants" TEXT /* Reactants involved in the reaction */,
  "products" TEXT /* Products formed in the reaction */,
  "kinetic_law_id" INTEGER /* ID of the kinetic law associated with the reaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the reaction */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the reaction data */,
  "reversibility" INTEGER /* Whether the reaction is reversible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reactions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reactions_kinetic_law_id FOREIGN KEY ("kinetic_law_id") REFERENCES kinetic_laws ("kinetic_law_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kinetic_laws" (
  "kinetic_law_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kinetic law */,
  "model_id" TEXT /* ID of the model the kinetic law belongs to */,
  "kinetic_law_expression" TEXT /* Mathematical expression of the kinetic law */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the kinetic law */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the kinetic law */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the kinetic law */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kinetic_law_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, modeler, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" TEXT /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "model_id" TEXT /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
